name: Recipefork Kitchen Chat
description: AI cooking assistant chat for RecipeFork-style apps. Covers persistent conversation history, recipe-aware responses, ingredient constraints, image references, and save/fork actions from assistant output.

standard.description: Threaded AI kitchen chat with history rail, message list, citations/recipe chips, and composer.

slots.composer: Prompt input with image or ingredient context controls
slots.recipe-actions: Save, fork, assign to cookbook, or regenerate actions

visual_brief: A focused product chat, not a standalone chatbot demo. The conversation should inherit RecipeFork navigation, cards, and typography; assistant outputs should turn into recipe-aware blocks with ingredients, steps, tips, and save/fork controls.

layout_hints.brownfield_fit: Preserve existing chat persistence, Claude/Vision integration, and auth boundaries. Do not replace working app behavior with static demo messages.
layout_hints.output_structure: Assistant recipe responses should be structured enough for save/fork flows, not just markdown blobs.
layout_hints.history: History is a product surface: show useful titles, dates, generated/saved states, and empty states.

micro.stream: Streaming text may reveal linearly while preserving layout stability.
micro.send: Send button may show a compact pending state during request dispatch.

transitions.message: New messages may enter with a subtle fade/slide; avoid large motion inside long threads.

responsive.mobile: History collapses behind a drawer or segmented view. Composer remains reachable at the bottom.
responsive.tablet: Thread first; history can be a narrow rail.
responsive.desktop: History rail plus main conversation area.

keyboard: Composer submit, history navigation, and recipe action buttons must be keyboard reachable.
announcements: Announce new assistant messages and generation errors without interrupting typing.
